designNote: Go SIEM adapter validation uses local-only transport injection plus an explicit endpointSafetyCheck hook for network adapters, a temp export root for JSON_FILE, and separate endpoint-safety negative tests. The harness never disables production endpoint safety in runtime code and never requires production SIEM or Cerebro credentials.

adapters.expectedSafety: endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the Splunk HEC request
endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the Panther HTTP-source request
endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the Panopticon request
endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the Elasticsearch bulk request
endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the Datadog logs request
endpoint safety is checked before the injected transport captures the generic webhook request
endpoint safety is checked before both the local Cerebro runtime check and claim write captures
file writes are confined to APERIO_SIEM_EXPORT_DIR and traversal negatives remain covered
